title: contdid R simulate_contdid_data phase-3 invariant contract

seed_policy.none_rule: seed=None uses the default_seed registered for the requested dgp_id
seed_policy.explicit_seed_rule: explicit seed inputs must be nonnegative integers; booleans, strings, negative values, and non-integers raise seed must be a nonnegative integer

column_roles.time_period: integer panel index in long format
column_roles.Y: observed outcome after treatment assignment logic
column_roles.G: group/adoption cohort, with 0 reserved for never treated

panel_contract.never_treated_rule: G = 0 implies D = 0 for every row
generator_notes: The R generator draws a cross-sectional dose once per unit, pivots outcomes to long format, then overwrites D to zero for never-treated units.
Time effects are hard coded to the integer time index, while individual effects are Gaussian with mean equal to G.

invariants.rule: each id appears exactly once per time_period
D is constant within id after pivoting to long format
all observed D values lie in [0, 1]
time_period values are integers on [1, num_time_periods]

dgp_registry.summary: Null linear and quadratic dose effects for baseline invariant checks.
Positive linear dose effect with zero quadratic term.
Zero linear term with positive quadratic dose curvature.

phase3_route.consumer: Phase 3 simulate-data parity and invariant tests
phase3_route.next_step: Use this manifest to drive schema/invariant assertions before estimator code lands.
phase3_route.blocking_note: This contract is a helper asset only; package implementation still belongs to the Phase 3 execution owner.
